evidence: "I thought this anthology series featuring an ensemble cast set in a weird world would be interesting and at first it was."
"While the cast performance is great and true to character it seems the whole Star Trek franchise is devolving into dark shoot-em ups."
"Bravo! This film's twists and turns forced me to think about the quirky nature of time travel."
"Most of the episode left me thinking long after watching them but 'Safe and Sound' and 'Kill all Others' were very dark and disturbing."
"It did seem to drag a bit but by episode five it came to a screeching halt for me and I found myself skipping forward to the finish."
"While the cast performance is great and true to character it seems the whole Star Trek franchise is devolving into dark shoot-em ups."
"I just watched episode one. This is standard Tom Clancy military propaganda."
"I enjoyed the portrayal of LBJ by Woody Harrelson but the film was marred for me by the closed captioning."
"While I'm a fan of Tom Hanks and Carrie Fisher I felt this movie was intended for the 8-15 year old male demographic."
"While the cast performance is great and true to character it seems the whole Star Trek franchise is devolving into dark shoot-em ups."
"Pay close attention to the little details as the story progresses."
"Most of the episode left me thinking long after watching them but 'Safe and Sound' and 'Kill all Others' were very dark and disturbing."
"I didn't feel much empathy toward any of the main characters."
"This film was boring and a complete waste of time for me."

summary: The user shows a preference for complex narratives that provoke thought, but they often find films and series to be slow-paced and lacking emotional engagement. They express mixed feelings towards genres and demonstrate low brand loyalty, indicating a more casual approach to their viewing choices.
